digest.title: A scorecard for the AI age
digest.tldr: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenaAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

digest.title: Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters
Why teens deserve access to safe AI
digest.tldr: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
